description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a large, hipped roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are a combination of white plaster and wood-textured paneling, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. Large glass windows and sliding doors are present on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The structure includes two distinct extensions: one with a flat roof and large windows, and another with a partially open roof featuring three rectangular skylights or cutouts. A wooden deck area is visible, likely serving as an outdoor living space. The overall layout suggests a single-story residence with a focus on open-plan living and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a hipped roof, white and wood-paneled exterior, large windows, and two distinct extensions including a deck and skylight section.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with large glass doors, a white wall, and a wood-paneled extension to the right.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the main entrance with a central door, flanked by wood paneling and a large windowed extension on the right.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the long white wall with three vertical windows and the open-roofed extension with green flooring.
description_view_3: The opposite side displays the wood-paneled extension with three skylights and a smaller windowed section to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with minimal overhang, flanked by large glass panels and wood accents, no visible steps or porch
